story.so_that: I can perform basic addition operations
story.i_want: be able to add two positive integers together

journey.before: User needs to perform addition calculations manually or use external tools
journey.during: User opens the calculator application, enters two positive integers, and submits the addition request
journey.after: User receives the sum and can perform additional calculations or exit the application

capability_breakdown.core_action: Accept two positive integers as input and return their sum

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Add Two Positive Integers - System returns the sum of two positive integers
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a user AND I provide two positive integers When I submit the addition request Then the system returns the sum of the two integers
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Calculate sum of two positive integers

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Add Negative Numbers - System returns an error message for mixed sign inputs
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a user AND I provide one negative integer and one positive integer When I submit the addition request Then the system returns an error message

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Add Zero - System returns the positive integer when adding zero
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a user AND I provide one zero and one positive integer When I submit the addition request Then the system returns the positive integer
